anyOf.description: User-supplied string that must contain visible content, not just whitespace.

primaryHarness.description: New sticky primary harness; null clears back to engine routing.

credentialProfileId.description: New sticky credential profile; null clears back to engine-default credentials.

anyOf.description: Filesystem/command access profile for a run: readonly (no writes), workspace_write (writes inside the workspace only), full (unrestricted; requires the per-repo trust allow), external_sandbox_full (full access inside an external sandbox), inherit_native (defer to the harness's own native sandbox settings).

access.description: New sticky write scope; null clears back to the repo trust default.

ControlThreadUpdateRequest.description: Request body for PATCH /threads/:id: rename, archive, or switch sticky routing.
